manualReviewSteps: Confirm latest CI and CodeQL passed for the exact commit under review.
Confirm this template is not represented as generated evidence.
Run or inspect local Enterprise Lab smoke evidence when needed.
Confirm generated evidence stays under ignored target/ paths and is not committed.
Confirm no branch protection, rulesets, required checks, GitHub settings, secrets, or environments changed.
safetyBoundaries: no file reads by the endpoint
no process execution by the endpoint
no environment variable or credential reads by the endpoint
no external network calls by the endpoint
no filesystem mutation by the endpoint
no branch protection or required-check mutation
recommendedNextSteps: Use the template to review the artifact shape only.
Keep local evidence generators deterministic and ignored under target/.
Approve a validator before any CI parser reads generated evidence.
Approve failure policy and runtime cost before adding any CI enforcement.
Keep GitHub settings and branch protection changes outside this prototype.
